purpose: Test simple WXYZTI cycle generator candidates from the 30 indexed carrier-law columns against the known 18-row table.
boundary: This does not close Gap A.
The 18-row table is used only as a scoring target.
The tested candidate family is simple and incomplete.
A negative result does not prove no source-native generator exists.

claim.short_form: No exact WXYZTI row generator from the 30 columns was found in the tested simple cycle/affine family.
claim.not_closed_reason: The generator is either absent from this tested family or still not source-native proof.

interpretation.main_result: The missing generator is not a simple column-index, mod-6 role-pair, or affine scalar rule in this tested family.
interpretation.what_this_rules_out: Simple cycle generators using column index, source slot edges, p900 sector pairs, petersen edge pairs, shared vertices, shifts, and affine scalar mod rules.
interpretation.remaining_path: Use derived/projection artifacts to infer a less trivial row generator, then re-test it source-first.
interpretation.next_move: Derive a candidate row generator from projection/register artifacts rather than from simple 30-column features alone.
